description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a prominent sloped gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray material, contrasted by black window frames and trim. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front includes a recessed entryway with a small porch area and a garage integrated into the lower level, partially shielded by a short wall. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, creating a private courtyard or driveway space. The overall structure is two stories tall, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped reddish-brown gable roof, light gray walls, large asymmetrical windows, and an integrated garage within a low-walled courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, garage, and the sloped roof overhanging the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof eaves, minimal windows, and the enclosing perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, the back of the garage, and the enclosed courtyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the roof's slope, few small windows, and the continuous perimeter wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small porch, single main door, and an overhanging roof above the entry and garage.
